calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by Plaintiff in pro per. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by Joe Vickstein. (212)
